description: Add an export_csv method to ReportGenerator in reporter.py. The class is initialized with a list of dictionaries. The export_csv method should return a string representing the data in CSV format. Empty data must return an empty string. The headers in the CSV output must be sorted alphabetically to ensure deterministic ordering. Any fields containing commas, double quotes, or newlines must be correctly escaped according to standard CSV rules. Run the tests to verify correctness.
